failed_rules.message: LoanType must be Closed End Second for 2nd Lien program
Property type 'Residential 5-8 Units' not eligible for DSCR - Investment. Available: SFR, PUD, Warrantable Condo, 2-4 Units
New Jersey is not eligible for 2nd liens in wholesale/retail channels
US Citizens are not eligible for Select ITIN program.
Occupancy 'Investment Property' not eligible. Available: Primary Residence
Super Jumbo program only available for Primary (Owner Occupied) occupancy - Non-Owner Occupied not eligible
Multi-Family 5-8 Units is not eligible for Investor DSCR - refer to DSCR Multi (5-8 Units) program

Property type 'Residential 5-8 Units' not eligible for Foreign National, Investment Property, FICO Score 784. Available: Single Family, PUD, 2-4 Units, Warrantable Condo, Non-Warrantable Condo, Condotel
US Citizens are not eligible for Foreign National program - FAIL
Property type 'Residential 5-8 Units' not eligible for Investment Property. Available: SFR, PUD, Warrantable Condo, Non-Warrantable Condo, Co-op, Condotel, 2-4 Units
Property type 'Residential 5-8 Units' not eligible for Investment Property. Available: SFR, PUD, Warrantable Condo, 2-4 Units
Property type 'Residential 5-8 Units' not eligible for Investment Property. Available: SFR, PUD, Warrantable Condo, 2-4 Units
Multi-Family 5-8 Units is not eligible for Investor DSCR No Ratio - refer to DSCR Multi (5-8 Units) program

document_requests.document_type: Borrower Certification as to Business Purpose
specifications: Must identify all borrowers by name
Must identify the subject property address
Must declare that the property is, or will be, for commercial business or investment purpose only
Must be signed and dated by all borrowers
Must state that the property will not be occupied by any borrower, any member of the borrower's LLC, or any family member
Must be consistent with DSCR loan program requirements
Must reconcile with non-owner occupied investment property designation
reasons_needed: Required per NQMF guidelines for all Business Purpose loans
DSCR loans and investment properties must be processed as Business Purpose transactions
Occupancy and business purpose representations must be documented and consistent
Compliance requirement for non-TRID transaction processing
Borrower attestation needed that property will not be occupied by borrower or related parties

specifications: Must be completed by licensed appraiser
Must include all 5-8 units in the subject property
Must show market rent analysis for each unit
Must reflect current lease terms if property is tenant-occupied
Must use lesser of estimated market rent or lease agreement amounts
Must account for any management fees reflected on appraisal report
Must support rental income qualification for DSCR loan
reasons_needed: DSCR loan qualification requires rental income documentation via Form 1007 for multi-unit properties
Market rent analysis is required to determine qualifying rental income
Multi 5-8 unit properties require rent schedule per guidelines
Rental income calculation must use lower of market rent or lease amounts

specifications: Must include all current tenant-occupied units
Must show monthly rent amount for each unit
Must identify tenant names and unit addresses
Must show lease term and expiration dates
Must be signed by landlord and tenant
Must demonstrate rental amounts are at market rate
For month-to-month leases, provide 2 months bank statements showing rental receipt
reasons_needed: Current lease agreements required to document existing rental income on occupied units
Lease amounts must be compared to market rent analysis for qualification
Month-to-month leases require bank statement support per guidelines
Rental income verification for DSCR loan qualification

document_requests.document_description: Current government-issued photo identification for all borrowers
specifications: Must be current and not expired
Must clearly show borrower's full legal name matching loan application
Must include photo and signature
Acceptable forms: driver's license, state ID, passport, military ID

reasons_needed.reason: Identity verification is required for all loan transactions to confirm borrower identity
Ensures consistency of borrower identification across all loan documents

document_requests.document_description: IRS Form 4506-C Request for Transcript of Tax Return
specifications: Must be fully executed and signed by all borrowers
Must authorize transcript request for 2-4 most recent tax years
Must include borrower's current address and SSN
Must be dated within 120 days of submission

reasons_needed.reason: Required per guideline for all income documentation as stated: 'a fully executed and signed IRS Form-4506C'
Enables verification of reported income through tax transcript comparison

document_requests.document_description: Occupancy certification or declaration for non-owner occupied investment property
specifications: Must confirm property will be used as investment/rental property
Must be signed and dated by all borrowers
Must be consistent with loan application occupancy designation
Must acknowledge non-owner occupied status and rental income expectations

reasons_needed.reason: Investment property occupancy affects LTV limits, reserve requirements, and qualification guidelines
Ensures compliance with occupancy-based lending requirements and program eligibility

specifications: Must be complete tri-merge or Residential Mortgage Credit Report (RMCR) for all borrowers
Must provide merged credit information from the 3 major national credit repositories (Experian, TransUnion, and Equifax)
Must identify all borrowers on the loan
Must show credit scores from all bureaus
Must show tradeline details with payment history
Must show mortgage history if available on credit report
Must show inquiries, public records, disputes, collections, charge-offs, and alerts
Must be dated within allowed recency window
Must include verification of all credit references provided on loan application
Must certify results of public record searches for each city where borrower has resided in last 2 years
reasons_needed: Credit score verification required to validate program eligibility and pricing
Tradeline and credit history requirements must be reviewed per NQMF guidelines
Credit report needed to identify any credit events, inquiries, disputes, and mortgage history
Required for all borrowers per NQMF underwriting guidelines
Necessary to verify borrower creditworthiness for DSCR loan qualification

specifications: Must provide coverage for rental income loss
Must cover the subject multi-unit property
Must show policy terms and coverage amounts
Must be in borrower's name or entity name
Must demonstrate adequate protection for rental income stream
Must cover subject property for hazard/fire insurance
Must include extended coverage for wind, civil commotion, smoke, hail, aircraft, vehicle, explosion
Must provide replacement cost coverage (not actual cash value)
Must include proper mortgagee clause and loss payee provisions
Must name all borrowers holding title as named insured
Must be effective for at least 60 days after funding with notice of cancellation provisions
Coverage amount must be adequate for property value and loan amount
Must cover subject DSCR property for rent loss
Must equal at least 6 months of PITIA (Principal, Interest, Taxes, Insurance, Association dues)
Must identify subject property and provide adequate coverage period
Blanket policies covering subject property are acceptable
Must include proper loss payee and mortgagee provisions
reasons_needed: Rent loss insurance protects rental income stream for DSCR qualification
Required for multi-unit investment property financing
Supports rental income stability for underwriting analysis
Required hazard insurance protection for lender and borrower
Collateral protection against fire and extended perils
Standard requirement for all mortgage loans
Required for DSCR loans to protect against rental income loss
Ensures debt service coverage protection for investment property
Mitigates cash flow risk for non-owner occupied rental property

document_requests.reasoning: Bank statements are required to verify assets for funds to close and reserve calculation on this cash-out refinance transaction
specifications: Must cover the most recent 2 months
Must include all pages showing beginning and ending balances
Must show borrower name as account holder
Must show financial institution name and account number or masked identifier
Must show complete transaction history
Must be dated within 90 days of note date per NQMF guidelines
Must support verification of funds for closing costs and cash-out proceeds
Must support reserve calculation for investment property requirements
Must calculate required reserve months based on loan program requirements
Must identify acceptable asset sources for reserve calculation
Must show PITIA amount used in reserve calculation
Must demonstrate sufficient verified liquid assets meet or exceed reserve requirement
Must account for any overlay requirements that may increase reserve months
Must exclude any restricted or illiquid assets from reserve calculation
reasons_needed: Verify sufficient liquid assets for closing costs and cash-out refinance proceeds
Calculate and verify reserve requirements for non-owner occupied investment property
Confirm account ownership and asset authenticity
Identify any large deposits that may require additional sourcing documentation
Verify borrower maintains adequate post-closing liquidity for investment property
Confirm compliance with DSCR loan program reserve requirements
Document reserve calculation methodology and asset sources
Ensure reserve assets are verified through bank statements or other acceptable documentation

specifications: Must identify subject property address in New Jersey
Must identify property type as Multi (5-8 Units) and unit count (5-8 units)
Must show appraised value to support 70% LTV calculation
Must be dated within 365 days of Note date with recertification required if exceeds 120 days
Must include all pages and addenda
Must use Form 1025 (Small Residential Income Property Appraisal Report) for 5-8 unit properties
Must include Form 1007 Rent Schedule for all rental units since property is investment/DSCR
Must identify borrower/owner information and reconcile with loan file
Must disclose repairs, adverse conditions, or inspection requirements
Must include comparable sales and appraiser certification
Must include rent roll and income/expense statement
Must include photos of subject (exterior/interior) and street scene
Must include aerial photo, sketch/floor plan of typical units, and map
reasons_needed: Collateral valuation is required for underwriting the DSCR Multi (5-8 Units) loan
LTV/CLTV eligibility depends on appraised value for 70% LTV target
Property type and unit count (5-8 units) affect program eligibility
DSCR loan requires rental income analysis supported by Form 1007
Subject property identity must be consistent across the loan file

specifications: Must identify subject property address
Must provide risk assessment score and findings
Must address any data integrity issues or value concerns
Must be completed for the submitted appraisal report
reasons_needed: Standard appraisal review product required with appraisal submissions
Risk assessment validation for underwriting decision
Data quality verification for appraisal accuracy

specifications: Must identify subject property address in New Jersey
Must show flood zone designation and FEMA map information
Must indicate whether property is in Special Flood Hazard Area (SFHA)
Must be provided by FEMA-approved flood determination service
Must specify if flood insurance is required
reasons_needed: Required to determine flood insurance requirements for the property
FEMA regulation compliance for mortgage lending
Flood zone determination affects insurance and loan terms

specifications: Must cover subject property if located in Special Flood Hazard Area
Must meet minimum coverage requirements (lesser of replacement cost, $250,000 per dwelling, or loan amount)
Must be NFIP policy or equivalent private flood insurance
Must include proper mortgagee clause
Must name all borrowers holding title as named insured
Must be effective for loan term and include notice of cancellation provisions
reasons_needed: Required if property is located in flood zone A or V
FEMA and lender requirements for flood hazard protection
Collateral protection for loan in flood-prone areas

specifications: Must identify borrower/owner/vested parties matching loan application
Must identify subject property address and complete legal description
Must disclose all liens, judgments, easements, exceptions, and title requirements
Must show title insurer and effective date within acceptable recency window
Must reconcile vesting with borrower name(s) and transaction structure
Must confirm property ownership and insurable interest for 5-8 unit investment property
reasons_needed: Title must confirm ownership, lien position, and insurable interest before loan approval
Vesting and subject property must align with loan file and borrower identity
Liens and exceptions may affect closing conditions and lender's security interest
Required for all mortgage transactions to establish clear title and lien priority
document_requests.borrower_privacy_notes: Contains property ownership and lien details

specifications: Must show current ownership/vesting in borrower name(s)
Must match borrower identity on loan application
Must show complete legal description of subject property
Must be properly executed and recorded deed
Must confirm ownership structure for investment property transaction
Must align with title commitment vesting information
reasons_needed: Confirms property ownership and vesting in borrower name(s)
Required to verify borrower has legal authority to mortgage the property
Must align with NQMF vesting requirements showing individual borrower names
Essential for underwriter review of ownership and transaction authority
document_requests.borrower_privacy_notes: Contains property ownership and borrower identity information

specifications: Must identify current mortgage creditor/servicer
Must show borrower name and account number
Must show exact payoff amount for cash-out refinance transaction
Must show good-through date for payoff calculation
Must identify subject property or secured lien details
Must include per diem calculation if applicable for timing
reasons_needed: Existing mortgage lien must be paid off in refinance transaction
Payoff amount required to calculate cash-out proceeds and funds to close
Required for all refinance transactions to clear existing liens
Essential for underwriter review of transaction structure and cash flow
document_requests.borrower_privacy_notes: Contains existing mortgage payment and account information
